_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: Note raised nuclear expression of YAP in NF2 single (L; arrows) and NF2/TAZ double (N; arrows) null tissue, which is lost in NF2/YAP double null tissue (M; arrows)
details: Successfully detected elevated nuclear YAP expression in NF2 single null and NF2/TAZ double null tissue, which was lost in NF2/YAP double null tissue
